steps.title: Complete the squares
steps.content:
Move the constant and complete the square for both variables.
$$
x^2-8x+y^2-6y=56
$$
$$
(x-4)^2+(y-3)^2=56+16+9=81
$$

steps.title: Find the square side
steps.content:
The circle has radius
$$
r=\sqrt{81}=9
$$
If the circle is inscribed in the square, the square's side length is the diameter.
$$
2r=18
$$

steps.title: Compute the perimeter
steps.content: The perimeter of the square is $$ 4(18)=72 $$ The answer is C.
